native_form.query:
SELECT "source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE" AS "SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 0) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 0 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T0 % Watchers", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 1) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 1 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T1 % Watchers", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 2) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 2 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T2 % Watchers", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 3) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 3 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T3 % Watchers", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 4) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 4 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T4 % Watchers", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 5) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 5 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T5 % Watchers", CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN ("source"."Watchdays" > 0) AND ("source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 6) THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double) / NULLIF(CAST(count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" = 6 THEN "source"."USER_ID" END) AS double), 0.0) AS "T6 % Watchers" FROM (SELECT TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE")) AS "SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE", "source"."USER_ID" AS "USER_ID", "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" AS "DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD", "source"."M0_PLAN_ID" AS "M0_PLAN_ID", SUM("source"."WATCH_TIME_MIN") AS "Watchtime Minutes", count(distinct CASE WHEN "source"."WATCH_TIME_MIN" > 0 THEN "source"."DATE_FROM_SUBSCRIPTION_START" END) AS "Watchdays" FROM (select * from 
--sandbox.harshit.VIZ_NEW_SUBSCRIBER_M0_WATCH_ACTIVITY_EXCL_79_PLAN
ANALYTICS_PROD.DBT_VIZ.VIZ_NEW_SUBSCRIBER_M0_WATCH_ACTIVITY) AS "source" GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE")), "source"."USER_ID", "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD", "source"."M0_PLAN_ID" ORDER BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE")) ASC, "source"."USER_ID" ASC, "source"."DAYS_ACTIVE_IN_TRIAL_PERIOD" ASC, "source"."M0_PLAN_ID" ASC) AS "source" GROUP BY "source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE" ORDER BY "source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE" ASC
